#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 4+5: FIX EXPOSED PORTS'
echo '========================================'

# --- 4A: Fix WordPress docker-compose (MySQL + WP) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4A: Reading WP compose ---'
WP_COMPOSE='/opt/claude-chat/mebelit-wp/docker-compose.yml'
cat "$WP_COMPOSE"

echo ''
echo '--- 4A: Fixing WP compose ports ---'
cp "$WP_COMPOSE" "${WP_COMPOSE}.backup.$(date +%s)"

# Replace 0.0.0.0:3306 with 127.0.0.1:3306
sed -i 's/"3306:3306
